Global Variable# kIMKLocateCandidatesRightHint

macOS 10.5+

```
var kIMKLocateCandidatesRightHint: Int { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/inputmethodkit/kimklocatecandidatesrighthint#Discussion)

Place the candidates window to the right of the current text selection.
